summary: CRM Phase 1 testing complete. All 13 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend components (CRMAlerts, RevenueDashboard) rendering correctly with working interactions.

issues: Console warning about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) during initial render - doesn't affect functionality but indicates a race condition with container sizing
Celebration modal for 'quote_accepted' fires on first dashboard load blocking interactions - should clear localStorage 'celebration_quoteAccepted' to prevent

GET /api/crm/revenue returns revenue stats with 12-month trend - PASSED
GET /api/crm/income returns income records with lead details - PASSED

Dashboard layout: CRM and Revenue side by side on desktop (xl:grid-cols-2) - PASSED
Show All Alerts button expands full alert list (5 → 20) - PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: CRM routes properly mounted at /api/crm with all endpoints working
Alert generation logic correctly prioritizes HIGH > MEDIUM > LOW
Auto-pipeline advancement on interaction logging working as expected
Revenue stats aggregation correctly calculates monthly/yearly totals
Income tracking integrated with lead and quote references
